input:
Medical Certificate
I, under the signature of Professor DRALI, certify that the child Mansouri Chaima, aged 7 years old, has been followed at our level for 3 years for the management of his pathology, namely a Syndromic Primary Immunodeficiency type Hyper IgE Syndrome
Rare pathology, of genetic origin, requiring lifelong treatment based on a monthly IV immunoglobulin injection as well as oral antibiotic and antifungal therapy (The medical CR is attached)
The patient also requires regular clinical and para-clinical monitoring.
The certificate is given to parents to assert their right
Professor DRALI
Head of Department Physician
